mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_ui.workflow_checkpoint ( run_id, node_name, sequence_no, status, input_json, output_json, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{runId}::uuid, #{nodeName}, #{sequenceNo}, #{status}, #{inputJson}::jsonb, #{outputJson}::jsonb, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, run_id AS runId, node_name AS nodeName, sequence_no AS sequenceNo, status, input_json::text AS inputJson, output_json::text AS outputJson, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt FROM agent_ui.workflow_checkpoint WHERE run_id = #{runId}::uuid ORDER BY sequence_no ASC, id ASC
